productDisplayName: Asics Men's Gel Strike 2 Running White Silver Shoe
description: CompositionSilver white running shoes in synthetic leather with mesh upper, reflective material, California slip and solid, high abrasion rubber outsole with GEL Strike 2 technology Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlightFittingRegularMade for that best running experience, these lightweight shoes from asics made of synthetic leather (PU) have a mesh upper to ensure ample breath ability, enhancing performance. The reflective material enhances visibility in low light, while the California slip ensures lasting stability and comfort. The upper and midsole are stitched together to ensure durability and the rearfoot GEL Cushioning System provides shock attenuation to the heel during impact phase. High abrasion rubber is placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability. On the whole, a perfect footwear for urban living.
